llm_extracted.ai_arm_selection_rationale: This is a between-subjects design where Group A used GPT-4 for complaint drafting (n=30) and Group B did not use AI for complaint drafting (n=29). The comparison is with_gpt4 vs no_gpt4 for the complaint drafting task.
llm_extracted.notes: Level A extraction: means and SDs directly reported. Group A (n=30) used GPT-4 for complaint drafting; Group B (n=29) did not use AI for complaint drafting. The reported difference is 0.17 grade points with 95% CI (-0.03, 0.37).
source_quotes: Complaint Drafting: No GPT-4 (Std. Dev.) 3.14 (0.59), With GPT-4 (Std. Dev.) 3.31 (0.50), Difference (95% CI) 0.17 (-0.03, 0.37), p-value 0.0862
Group A used GPT-4 for the contract drafting and complaint drafting tasks
Group B used GPT-4 for the employee handbook and client memo tasks, and refrained from using GPT-4 or any other type of AI for the contract drafting and complaint drafting tasks

computed.notes: Level A extraction: means and SDs directly reported. Group A (n=30) used GPT-4 for complaint drafting; Group B (n=29) did not use AI for complaint drafting. The reported difference is 0.17 grade points with 95% CI (-0.03, 0.37).
